name: fable-mcp
description: Use Claude Fable 5 as a deep-reasoning architect and evaluator inside OpenAI Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Fable 5 planning, review, and eval-loop tools for Codex
interface.longDescription: Fable MCP lets Codex consult Claude Fable 5 as a read-only architect and evaluator. It provides beginner-friendly setup, local setup diagnostics, deep planning, Fable-backed answers, implementation review, and a Stop-hook-driven quality loop with criteria approval, abort, best-snapshot restore, and cost tracking.
defaultPrompt: Fable5にこの設計をレビューさせて
Plan mode: use Fable to plan this change
90点合格まで品質ループで仕上げて
